About Me

Who I Am

I am an Electronics and Communication Engineering student at Rajalakshmi Engineering College with a strong interest in exploring technology through both software and hardware perspectives.

I enjoy building practical solutions, working on real-world projects, and continuously learning new tools and technologies. I focus on developing efficient, user-friendly systems while improving my problem-solving and technical skills.

I am passionate about innovation and aim to grow as a versatile engineer capable of contributing to impactful projects.
